title: The Dawn of the Agent Age

mentions.quoted_text: The latest update for Apple's coding platform Xcode adds support for both Clawed Agent and OpenAI's Codecs directly in the developer environment.
mentions.context_snippet: Xcode update brings agentic coding support with Clawed Agent and OpenAI's Codecs, enabling autonomous coding workflows.

facts.fact_value: Xcode supports Clawed Agent and OpenAI's Codecs for agentic coding

mentions.quoted_text: A Clawed Code outage saw software engineer productivity absolutely plummet.
mentions.context_snippet: Clawed Code experienced an outage causing widespread errors and degraded API performance, impacting developers.

facts.fact_value: Clawed Code outage caused significant developer productivity loss

mentions.quoted_text: OpenClaw is sort of like an assistant protocol for Cloud Code.
mentions.context_snippet: OpenClaw turns Cloud Code into an assistant with access to computer services, gaining thousands of users rapidly.

facts.fact_value: Assistant protocol enabling agentic assistants with access to computer services
Rapid adoption with thousands of users and Mac Mini purchases

mentions.quoted_text: Multbook built itself as the social network for AI agents.
mentions.context_snippet: Multbook launched as a social network for AI agents, growing from 2,000 to over 1.5 million agents in weeks.

facts.fact_value: Social network platform for AI agents
Grew from 2,000 to over 1.5 million agents rapidly

mentions.quoted_text: Gemini would in fact be powering Apple's on-device AI.
mentions.context_snippet: Gemini model confirmed as powering Apple's on-device AI, reinforcing Google's AI tailwinds.
New Chinese model from Alibaba called Kuen noted in AI race updates.
Moonshot's Kimi K25 is a leading open-weight multimodal model with agent swarm features.

facts.fact_value: Multimodal, agent swarms, close to state-of-the-art at lower price

mentions.quoted_text: Grok platform is part of XAI now owned by SpaceX.
mentions.context_snippet: Grok platform acquired by SpaceX through merger with XAI.

facts.fact_value: Part of XAI, now owned by SpaceX

mentions.quoted_text: Anthropic explained why Claude will remain ad free, contrasting with Chat GPT's advertising plans.
mentions.context_snippet: Discussion about advertising on Chat GPT and its impact on usage relative to competitors like Gemini and Claude.

facts.fact_value: Chat GPT expected to have advertising; Claude will remain ad free

mentions.quoted_text: Anthropic explained why Claude will remain ad free.
mentions.context_snippet: Claude model will remain ad free despite advertising on Chat GPT.
Rumors of new models coming including Sonnet 5, Opus 4.6, GPT 5.3, Gemini 3 Pro.
Users experienced a shift in AI coding capabilities with models like Opus 4.5.
Users had transformative experiences with GPT 5.2 Codex in AI coding projects.

mentions.quoted_text: Anthropic released Cloud Cowork, the Cloud Code for everyone else, built in 10 days by Cloud Code itself.
mentions.context_snippet: Cloud Code reshaping software development, enabling agentic coding and rapid project completion.

facts.fact_value: Cloud Cowork built by Cloud Code itself in 10 days

mentions.quoted_text: Anthropic launched Cloud Cowork to make Cloud Code more accessible.
mentions.context_snippet: Cloud Cowork is a more accessible version of Cloud Code, enabling wider agentic coding adoption.

facts.fact_value: Accessible agentic coding platform derived from Cloud Code

mentions.quoted_text: You Can With AI podcast hosted for KPMG focuses on deployment and responsible scaling of AI.
mentions.context_snippet: Podcast discussing enterprise AI strategy and practical deployment hosted by the episode speaker.

mentions.quoted_text: Apple just surrendered on AI. Xcode 26.3 now relies on Clawed and Codecs for agentic coding.
mentions.context_snippet: George Castillo criticizes Apple's AI strategy on X.

mentions.quoted_text: Apple is going to be a big winner in AI. Native apps are naturally easier to vibe code.
mentions.context_snippet: Dan Schipper offers positive perspective on Apple's AI future on X.

mentions.quoted_text: Clawed Code being out is worse than the internet being out.
mentions.context_snippet: Matt Silve comments on Clawed Code outage impact on X.

mentions.quoted_text: Anthropic will be the AWS-slash-Cloudflare of the development world.
mentions.context_snippet: Fabio Seychas compares Anthropic's importance to AWS and Cloudflare on X.

mentions.quoted_text: The OpenClaw and Mac Mini explosion proves power users want always-on agents with access to their data.
mentions.context_snippet: Anand Iyer comments on OpenClaw and Mac Mini adoption on X.

mentions.quoted_text: Chat GPT was the iPhone moment for LLMs, OpenClaw is the iPhone moment for agents.
mentions.context_snippet: Sigi Chen compares Chat GPT and OpenClaw impact on X.

notes: Podcast mentions multiple software products, models, organizations, and persons central to AI agent era developments.
Some entities like 'You Can With AI podcast' and 'aidailybrief.ai' are marked as 'other' with needs_review due to unclear type in locked taxonomy.
Social posts on X (formerly Twitter) are included with quoted_text and platform specified.
URLs are included only when explicitly mentioned or known; otherwise set to null.

Confidence scores reflect certainty of entity identification and fact extraction.
